content:
Package: ail.std.collections

Type: Option<T>
- Some(value: T)
- None

Type: Result<T,E>
- Success(value: T)
- Failure(error: E)

Type: List<T>
- Empty
- Items(values: T)

Type: Map<K,V>
- Empty
- Entries(key: K, value: V)

Type: Set<T>
- Empty
- Members(value: T)

Function: Option.map

The function needs:
- option: Option<T>
- mapper: Text

The function produces:
- result: Option<U>

When Option.map runs:
- if option is Some(value), call mapper with value
- return Some(mapped value)
- if option is None, return None
- record trace event OptionMapEvaluatedScenario003
